fieldData.description:
Vivid products feature low-maintenance beauty, thanks  to our innovative, proprietary Ultrex® fiberglass.  A wide range of sizes and configurations—and  a refined fit and finish—make Vivid an inspired choice for transitional to contemporary projects.

‍

Bold Design. Bolder Sizes.

When dramatic sizes, durability, and energy efficiency are top priorities, go boldly with the Marvin Vivid™ collection.

‍

Architectural Range

Simple, consistent profiles, dramatic maximum sizes, and a handpicked selection of features and options for transitional to contemporary architecture.

‍

Bold Performance

Featuring proprietary Ultrex® fiberglass for durability and energy efficiency, plus an innovative fiberglass reinforced composite on window interiors.

Refined Fit and Finish

Every detail is smooth and clean, thanks to engineered components that eliminate overlapping materials or joint welds.

fieldData.description:
With a .29 U-value for standard low-E, argon-filled dual-pane glass, a performance grade of CW-PG100 at sizes up to 60″ x 120″, and a mulling process that keeps sightlines narrow, the Series 7630 Window Wall is optimized for performance, flexibility, and versatility. Create a single panel, door size, or wall-sized opening – or mull with Performance Line ventilating window and hinged or sliding glass doors for limitless expression.

Series 7630 Window Wall

  • Extreme panel sizes
  • Industry-leading U-factors
  • Narrow sightlines
  • Highly configurable
  • Low-E glass, dual-paned
  • Thermally broken aluminum

Performance

Able to deliver energy efficiency in a variety of weather conditions, the Series 7630 Window Wall features a .29 U-value for standard low-E, argon-filled dual-pane glass. A signature aluminum extrusion design utilizing proprietary Insulbar technology further reduces energy consumption. Compliant with California’s rigorous Title 24 requirements.

Strength

Western Window Systems’ Series 7630 Window Wall achieves a performance grade of CW-PG100 at sizes up to 60″ x 120″. (CW-PG100 includes a design pressure of 100 pounds per square foot, the equivalent of 200 mph winds.)

Mulling

The mulling process for the Series 7630 Window Wall keeps sightlines narrow, resulting in a clean, contemporary look that can be replicated through an entire wall of glass. For even more customization, a 5.875″ frame depth allows Performance Line sliding doors, ventilating windows, and hinged doors to directly mull to any combination of windows.

fieldData.description:
Whether you want to create a single-panel opening, door-sized opening, or one that spans an entire wall, a Western Window Systems Series 600 Fixed Window or Window Wall allows you to create custom views from various glass sizes and shapes. And because they’re designed to mull with ventilating window styles as well as hinged and sliding doors, they’re flexible as well as functional.

  • Large panel sizes
  • Narrow sightlines
  • Highly configurable
  • Dual-paned low-E glass

Mulling

A versatile 4.5″ deep framing system allows Western Window Systems’ Series 900 Hinged Doors, Series 600 Sliding Glass Doors, and Series 670 hinged windows to directly mull to any combination of windows, creating a clean, smooth appearance.

Configurations and Sizes

The Series 600 Window Wall is available up to 70 square feet in practically any configuration. For larger expanses, steel can be added when mulling for increased strength. Fixed windows can be built to nearly any geometric configuration, including arches, circles, and polygons.

  • Energy Efficient Design
    Dual-pane insulated glass with Low-E coatings and warm-edge spacers help reduce heat transfer and improve comfort year-round.
    ‍
  • Smooth Operation
    Equipped with quality hardware for easy opening, closing, and locking, ensuring smooth, secure functionality.
    ‍
  • Easy Maintenance
    Vinyl surfaces resist fading and require minimal upkeep. Tilt-in sashes (on double-hung models) allow for effortless cleaning from inside your home.
    ‍

fieldData.description:
Alside Mezzo® Energy-Efficient Vinyl Windows offer a harmonious blend of sleek design, advanced energy performance, and lasting durability. Crafted for homeowners seeking both aesthetic appeal and cost-effective comfort, Mezzo windows provide a modern solution that enhances any home.

Key Features:

  • Thermally Optimized Design
    The narrowline EdgeForce™ frame and sash design maximize glass area, allowing more natural light into your home while maintaining structural integrity and energy efficiency.
    ‍
  • Enhanced Insulation
    Mezzo windows incorporate cavity foam insulation, utilizing graphite-enhanced polystyrene to improve thermal performance and reduce energy loss.
    ‍
  • Advanced Glass Technology
    Standard dual-pane insulated glass units with Low-E coatings help regulate indoor temperatures year-round, while optional triple-pane glass packages offer superior insulation for colder climates.
    ‍
  • Durable Construction
    Fusion-welded frames and sashes, along with CoreFX™ composite reinforcements, ensure long-lasting durability and resistance to warping, cracking, and peeling.
    ‍
  • Secure Locking System
    The Defense-Tek™ end-of-throw cam shift locking action provides increased strength and protection, enhancing the security of your home.
    ‍
  • Easy Maintenance
    Tilt-in sashes allow for convenient cleaning from inside your home, and the Ocular screen bulb seal aids in easy screen installation and removal.
    ‍
  • Aesthetic Customization
    Mezzo windows offer a variety of styles, colors, and decorative options, including simulated divided lites and V-grooved glass patterns, to complement your home's architecture.
    ‍
  • Energy Star® Certified
    Mezzo windows meet or exceed ENERGY STAR® requirements, contributing to energy savings and a reduced carbon footprint.

Perfect For:
Homeowners seeking a stylish, energy-efficient window solution that combines modern design with reliable performance and value.

The Simonton Pro™ Collection balances classic styling, energy-smart features, and lasting performance—offering homeowners an affordable yet refined vinyl window solution. Available exclusively through The Home Depot, Pro windows provide reliable quality and a clean, timeless appearance.

Key Features:

  • Traditional Design with Versatile Appeal
    Classic raised-frame design, available in white or tan vinyl, with color-matched cam locks and grille options to complement virtually any home aesthetic.
    ‍
  • Energy Efficiency Built In
    Standard features include a ¾" insulated glass unit with ProSolar® Low-E, Argon gas, and an Intercept® spacer system. Optional upgrades are available to meet ENERGY STAR® regional guidelines, offering more thermal comfort.
    ‍
  • Superior Build Quality & Weather Resistance
    Featuring fusion-welded vinyl frames and sash construction, multi-chambered profiles for enhanced strength and insulation, plus AAMA Gold certification for air, water, and structural endurance.
    ‍
  • Smart Functionality & Safety Features
    Innovative details like the Air Lok™ sash limiter (for safer ventilation), tilt-in cleaning operation, sloped sill design for improved drainage, and durable cam locks for enhanced security and weather resistance.
    ‍
  • Flexible Glass & Styling Options
    Wide array of glass options: privacy, tinted, safety-tempered, and double-strength for added performance and style. Grilles placed between the glass offer easy cleaning and refined aesthetic options.
    ‍
  • Warranty for Peace of Mind
    Backed by a Lifetime Limited Warranty covering vinyl, hardware, and screens, with prorated coverage (20–50 years) on insulating glass units. Warranty is transferable to future homeowners.

Perfect For:
Homeowners or remodelers seeking a well-built, energy-efficient vinyl window with classic proportions and reliable durability—especially when shopping through Home Depot for simplicity and availability.

Simonton StormBreaker Plus® windows and doors deliver top-tier impact protection, energy efficiency, and coastal durability—perfect for homes in hurricane-prone and high-velocity wind zones.     Comes with a robust Lifetime Limited Warranty covering vinyl, hardware, and screens, as well as long-term glass unit protection.

A250 windows offer narrow sightlines, energy efficiency, and durability. Designed for replacement and new construction applications, the A250 has the style and functionality you’ve been searching for.

Exceptional components

The rollers, locks, frame members, and hardware are designed to keep the A250 windows in the forefront of appearance and security. These handcrafted components contribute to the overall strength and durability that aluminum windows are known for.

Contemporary frame

With clean lines and narrow frames, these aluminum windows are the perfect complement to achieve contemporary design and enhance a modern architectural style. They’re also great for retrofit or new construction.

Durability

Thanks to their rigidity and durability, the A250 windows can be configured into combinations with a large glazing area for maximum views. What’s more, they beautifully accentuate the clean, thin lines of contemporary design.

Energy Efficient

The use of thermal barriers in aluminum-framed windows vastly improves insulating ability. Polyurethane is placed between the frame to create a thermal barrier and reduce the flow of heat, making the A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum windows more energy efficient.

Color options

Available in four exterior colors – black bean, bark, harmony, and frost – these fiberglass windows can complement any architectural design. Choose a color matched or white interior.

Aesthetic accessories

C650 Series windows offer a wide variety of grid types, patterns, and combinations to match your home style.

Beautiful Hardware

Attractive, durable, secure, and easy to operate, C650 Ultra Series hardware hits all the right notes. It’s available in white, clay, dark bronze, brushed chrome, or black.

Hardware

A contemporary vinyl window with an expansive viewable glass area and a narrow frame to help you embrace modern home design. With its aesthetic and functional options, the V300 Series window has a operating style you’ll love.

First-rate energy efficiency

A world of color

The premium colors of the V300 bring out the clean lines and angles of the window frame. Each color suits a neutral look, whether in light and dark variety, and can blend in or accent the surrounding wall color.

Maximum views

The frame profile is so narrow, you’ll hardly know it’s there while you're enjoying amazing views outside. Low-profile hardware, uniquely designed for this series, practically disappears from view.

Modern Design

Embrace modern home design with black windows. V300 Series offers black interior and exterior matching frames for the latest design trend. Or, choose a black exterior with a white interior. The choice is yours. The finish is achieved with a black acrylic layer extruded together with the underlying vinyl profile, ensuring maximum bonding and superior durability.

Boasting an elegant look that will beautify your home for years to come, V400 Tuscany® Series are top-of-the-line vinyl windows designed for new construction or renovation projects.

Excellent energy performance

V400 insulates and helps reduce energy usage in the winter and protect against heat build-up during the summer. The SunCoat® and SunCoatMAX® Low-E options further enhance the V400’s energy performance.

Aesthetic attributes

V400 Series vinyl windows offer equal sightlines and a wider frame shape that creates shadow lines for a more traditional look. This creates a calming and aesthetically pleasing effect that results in pure elegance.

Signature formula

Featuring a unique vinyl formula, V400 is the definition of high performance. The vinyl compound used in its formulation is precisely controlled, allowing it to withstand harsh climate conditions.

SmartTouch Technology

The patented SmartTouch® lock is available with horizontal sliders and single-hung V400 Series windows. With one hand you can easily pull the locking mechanism to unlock and open or close the window. The SmartTouch lock exceeds all California forced-entry requirements, which are among the most rigorous in the nation.

Explore a stunning curated collection. The Marvin Elevate® Collection is an ideal blend of remarkable design and superior strength. This curated collection of our most popular window types gives you the styles, features, and finishes you need to turn your vision into reality. Plus, natural wood interiors and Ultrex® fiberglass exteriors ensure beauty and durability for years to come.

Proven Strength

The facts speak for themselves. Our proprietary fiberglass is eight times stronger than vinyl and three times stronger than vinyl/wood composites. It resists fading, chalking, peeling, and cracking.

‍

Stylish Design

Warm wood interiors and on-trend styles are just the start. We’ve carefully considered every feature and option so that your windows and doors can make a statement or blend into the decor.

‍

Powerful Durability

Marvin is the leader in fiberglass, which outlasts vinyl windows by 38%1. Our pultruded fiberglass remains stable in extreme temperatures and expands at nearly the same rate as glass, so Elevate windows stay strong and true even in harsh conditions.

‍
1Life cycle assessment of windows for the North American residential market. Case study by the University of British Columbia. Scandinavian Journal of Forest Research, 2008

fieldData.description:
Coastline products are available in select southeast coastal regions. Designed and manufactured in Florida for the best coastal views, engineered for the worst coastal weather. Part of the Marvin Signature collection, Coastline is a versatile product portfolio that combines advanced, impact performance with inspiring design flexibility.

The extruded all aluminum frames and impact-resistant glass are engineered to withstand high winds and flying debris generated by severe storms and hurricanes. With the ability to achieve oversized, one-of-a-kind designs, even the most ambitious visions for coastal homes are possible.

‍

Designed for Coastal Weather

Coastline windows and doors are high velocity hurricane zone (HVHZ) approved, engineered to sustain high winds and flying debris generated by a tropical storm or hurricane. Made with extruded aluminum and impact-resistant glass, Coastline products meet stringent Miami-Dade County and state of Florida code requirements.

Premium Aesthetics

Coastline features a wide range of product types, sizes, configurations, and design options. Narrow sightlines provide a clean, shutter-free, well-maintained aesthetic to your home. Made with industrial-grade finishes to withstand corrosion and resist fading so your products retain their color, gloss, and beauty for years to come.

Dramatically Large Sizes

Coastline offers expansive views with dramatically large sizes to bring your most ambitious projects to life. Make a statement with a decorative, large-scale entry door or show off stunning views with vast expanses of glass—all customized to give you the freedom to design boldly.
